overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female character exploring a dimly lit, atmospheric old house with exposed stone walls and wooden interiors. The character ascends from a ground floor to an upper level containing a bedroom with antique furniture, illuminated by warm lamplight against the dark night visible through windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor entryway with wooden staircase

events.description: character begins ascending the wooden staircase
arriving at the upper landing from the stairwell

agents.ego_description: character walks through a dimly lit stone room and climbs a wooden staircase illuminated by a brass table lamp

entered.detail: ornate brass lamp with green glass shade sitting on a small wooden table
steep wooden stairs with dark risers ascending against a stone wall
rough-hewn stone wall with wooden beam accents
dark wooden shelving unit with various items
framed artwork hanging on the wall near the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a ground floor room with exposed stone walls and warm lamplight. She approaches and climbs a wooden staircase, transitioning from the lower level to the upper floor of the house.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper landing with weapon displays and storage chest

events.description: character approaches a wall-mounted rack holding rifles and shotguns
moving from the landing into a side corridor leading toward the bedroom

agents.ego_description: character explores the upper landing, examining a wooden storage chest and weapons rack before proceeding along a corridor with framed portraits

entered.detail: large wooden trunk with metal straps positioned under a tall window
wall-mounted wooden rack holding several long guns including rifles
tall multi-paned window showing dark blue night sky outside
woven wicker armchair positioned against the wall near a window
brass oil lamp mounted on the stone wall providing warm illumination
small wooden writing desk with papers and an inkwell

segments.scene_description: On the upper landing, the character explores an area featuring a wooden storage chest beneath a tall window and a wall-mounted weapons rack. She moves past a wicker chair and wall lamp toward a corridor leading deeper into the upper floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: master bedroom with four-poster bed and antique furniture

events.description: entering the bedroom from the corridor
character circles around the four-poster bed to explore the room
approaching a large wooden wardrobe and standing mirror

agents.ego_description: character enters a spacious bedroom and explores around a four-poster bed, examining the furniture including a wardrobe, mirror, and bedside tables

entered.detail: large wooden four-poster bed with canopy and white bedding
ornate brass lamp with green glass on a wooden nightstand
square opening in the sloped wooden ceiling with a ladder visible
tall dark wooden armoire with carved panel doors
full-length oval mirror on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters a warmly lit bedroom dominated by a four-poster bed and antique furniture. She circles the room, passing bedside lamps and examining a large wooden wardrobe and standing mirror, with a ceiling hatch visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to upper landing near stairwell

events.description: exiting the bedroom back to the stone-walled corridor
approaching the stairwell railing and storage chest

agents.ego_description: character exits the bedroom and returns to the upper landing, moving toward the staircase leading back down

entered.detail: wooden railing overlooking the stairwell down to the ground floor
the wooden trunk comes back into view near the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the bedroom through the doorway, returning to the stone-walled upper landing. She approaches the stairwell railing, with the wooden storage chest visible again near the stairs leading down.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from a rustic ground floor into a cozy upper-level bedroom before returning to the landing. It begins in a room with exposed stone walls and warm lamplight, following the character as she climbs a wooden staircase to reach the upper floor. As she reaches the landing, the scene opens up to reveal a wooden storage chest beneath a tall window and a weapons rack, moving past a wicker chair and into a corridor. The camera then shifts into a warmly lit bedroom dominated by a four-poster bed and antique furniture, circling past a large wardrobe and standing mirror before turning back toward the exit. Finally, the movement leads the character out of the bedroom and back to the stone-walled landing, ending as she approaches the stairwell railing.
